case_title: LOUISE A. SAMPSON VS. BANKERS STANDARD INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SAMPSON, LOUISE A. AS TO DEFENDANT BANKERS STANDARD INSURANCE COMPANY AKA CHUBB INDEMNITY INS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION REGARDING REPRESENTATION BY BEN DELANEY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMPSON, LOUISE A.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MICHAEL BEN DELANEY, PERSONAL ASSISTANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMPSON, LOUISE A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAMPSON, LOUISE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANKERS STANDARD INSURANCE COMPANY AKA CHUBB INDEMNITY INS. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,130.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED APR-26-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BANKERS STANDARD INSURANCE COMPANY AKA CHUBB INDEMNITY INS.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-26-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOE VOGEL, COVERAGE DIRECTOR FILED BY DEFENDANT BANKERS STANDARD INSURANCE COMPANY AKA CHUBB INDEMNITY INS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF LOUISE A. SAMPSON IS PRESENT. COURT DOES NOT ALLOW THE APPEARANCE OF MICHEL BEN DELANEY, ON BAHALF OF PLAINTIFF. MR. DELANEY IS PLAINTIFF'S PERSONAL ASSISTANT, WHICH IS NOT ALLOWABLE AS AN AUTHORIZED PERSON TO APPEAR ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT BANKERS STANDARD INSURANCE COMPANY, REPRESENTED BY JOE VOGEL, COVERAGE DIRECTOR, IS PRESENT. MR VOGEL STIPULATES TO A JUDGMENT OF $10,000 ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT ALSO STIPULATES THAT AN APPEAL WILL NOT BE FILED IN THIS MATTER. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
